name: SCC_GetFaultNotification
title: SCC_GetFaultNotification
syntax: long SCC_GetFaultNotification ( char FaultCode[], char FaultMsg[] )
description: Returns the fault code and fault message (optional) of the V2G message header.

parameters.name: FaultCode
parameters.description: Desired fault code, which must be a valid enum value according to the specification

return: 0 if no fault code is contained in the V2G header
